name: Potluck Rally
text: Creatures you control get +1/+1 until end of turn for each different snack physically present at the table, to a maximum of +3/+3. (If there are no snacks, that's the saddest rally, and they get +0/+0.)
flavorText: Marge brought the casserole. Dale brought chips. Someone brought a single hard-boiled egg and refuses to explain.

extras.fourthWall: counts real snacks at the table
